title: CLI commands and socket protocol for triggers/schedules
description:
Implement h2 trigger and h2 schedule CLI commands and the daemon socket protocol from docs/design-triggers-schedules.md.

Sections: CLI Interface, Dynamic registration via socket

Key deliverables:
- h2 trigger add/list/remove commands (internal/cmd/trigger.go)
- h2 schedule add/list/remove commands (internal/cmd/schedule.go)
- --exec and --message flags (mutually exclusive), --from, --priority for message
- --rrule, --start, --condition, --condition-mode for schedules
- --event, --state, --sub-state, --condition for triggers
- Socket request types: trigger_add, trigger_list, trigger_remove,
  schedule_add, schedule_list, schedule_remove
- Listener handlers in internal/session/listener.go for new request types
- Wire protocol additions to internal/session/message/protocol.go
- Ephemeral notice on dynamic registration
- Unit tests for CLI flag parsing/validation and listener handlers

References:
- Plan: docs/design-triggers-schedules.md §CLI Interface, §Dynamic registration via socket
- Depends on: h2-ifg.2 (TriggerEngine), h2-ifg.3 (ScheduleEngine)
